title: vigna unguiculata var. tenuis
intro: Vigna unguiculata var. tenuis, also known as the 'yardlong bean' or 'bamboo bean', is a type of legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The yardlong bean has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing cholesterol levels, regulating blood sugar levels, and providing essential nutrients such as protein, fiber, and vitamins. In herbal preparations, the yardlong bean is often used in teas, soups, and stir-fries, and it can also be consumed raw or cooked as a vegetable.
